objective: Implement FKTE Sprint 1 critical path: schema endpoint + orchestration for autonomous screen generation
trigger: Copilot stalled for 3+ hours with 0 files changed across 3 PRs

pr.title: [FKTE Sprint 1] Add schema endpoint + orchestration (Working Implementation)

task1.description: Rich field metadata endpoint from live Cosmos DB
features: Query live objects for sample data
Required field detection across sample set
Graceful handling: 200 empty for no objects, 503 with Retry-After on timeout

task3.description: Schema fetching orchestration with retry + graceful degradation
features: Graceful degradation: continues with empty schema if API down

task2_deferred.reason: Current template approach works for POC, schema data now available via {{LAYER_FIELDS_JSON}}
task2_deferred.status: Can revisit dynamic field rendering in future sprint if needed

end_to_end.schema_fetch_behavior: graceful_degradation (API was down, continued with empty schema)

stalled_prs_closed.title: Add schema fetching with retry and graceful degradation
stalled_prs_closed.reason: Checklist marked complete but 0 files committed

lessons_learned.copilot_limitations: Copilot can create implementation plans (checklists) but may stall on actual code generation for complex multi-file changes. 3-hour stall observed.
lessons_learned.dpdca_effectiveness: Manual DPDCA completed task in < 1 hour vs Copilot 3+ hour stall. Human pattern recognition + fractal problem decomposition faster for complex integration work.
lessons_learned.graceful_degradation: Schema orchestration tested with API down - confirmed graceful degradation works (continues with empty schema, generates valid code)
lessons_learned.evidence_discipline: Timestamped evidence files + JSON output enabled precise debugging and validation

next_phase.short_term: Test with live API (schema extraction from real 111 layers)
next_phase.long_term: Deploy to portal-face production, measure actual ROI
